videos.title: Single Drone Shot
videos.description: Aerial footage captured with DJI Mini 5 Pro in 4K D-Log mode. The cinematic look was achieved through careful color grading and enhancement using DaVinci Resolve.

videos.title: Dubai Love Lake
videos.description: Drone footage filmed using DJI Mini 5 Pro in 4K D-Log profile. The video was later professionally color graded and enhanced in DaVinci Resolve to preserve dynamic range and cinematic tones.
